description_long: This is a stylized young adult woman with a confident stance, arms outstretched horizontally. She wears a cropped tank top, fitted pants with utility pockets, and a wide belt adorned with pouches and accessories. Her outfit includes a single arm wrap on her right forearm and a knee pad on her left leg, suggesting a practical, urban, or adventurous context. She has sturdy lace-up boots and a choker necklace, adding to her modern, streetwise appearance. Her hair is cut in a short, straight bob, and her facial features are soft and expressive. The overall look is functional yet fashionable, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A young woman in practical, modern urban attire with utility accessories, boots, and a short bob hairstyle. Her stance and outfit suggest readiness and confidence.
description_view_0: Front view shows her facial features, cropped top, utility belt, and both arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm wrap, profile of her face, and the layered details of her belt and boots.
description_view_2: Back view reveals her open-back top, belt pouches, and the back of her boots and bob haircut.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the knee pad, belt accessories, and the side profile of her face and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: urban cropped tank top, fitted utility pants, wide belt with pouches, arm wrap, knee pad, choker necklace
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
